name: Red Potato Salad with Grainy Mustard Dressing
recipeInstructions:
------------------GRAINY MUSTARD DRESSING------------------
1/2 c Plain nonfat yogurt
3 tbsp Grainy mustard
1 tsp Chopped fresh dill
1/4 tsp Celery seed (optional)
1 tsp Chopped fresh basil or 1/4 tsp Dried Basil
1/2 tsp Salt
Freshly grated black pepper to taste
-- Combine dressing ingredients in a small mixing bowl and whisk until smooth.
Pour the dressing over the potato mixture and mix well.
Serve immediately or chill until ready to serve.
